/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librover_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o librover_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/rover_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_control_msgs/srv/detail/set_operational_mode__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_control_msgs/msg/detail/set_operational_mode__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_control_msgs/msg/detail/operational_mode_settings__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/rover_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/rover_control_msgs/msg/detail/current_operational_mode__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
